CreateCluster.description: Grants permission to create a cluster

CreateControlPanel.description: Grants permission to create a control panel

CreateRoutingControl.description: Grants permission to create a routing control

CreateSafetyRule.description: Grants permission to create a safety rule

DeleteCluster.description: Grants permission to delete a cluster

DeleteControlPanel.description: Grants permission to delete a control panel

DeleteResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to delete the RAM access control policy for a cluster

DeleteRoutingControl.description: Grants permission to delete a routing control

DeleteSafetyRule.description: Grants permission to delete a safety rule

DescribeCluster.description: Grants permission to describe a cluster

DescribeControlPanel.description: Grants permission to describe a control panel

DescribeRoutingControl.description: Grants permission to describe a routing control

DescribeSafetyRule.description: Grants permission to describe a safety rule

GetResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to get the resource policy of a cluster

ListAssociatedRoute53HealthChecks.description: Grants permission to list associated Route 53 health checks

ListControlPanels.description: Grants permission to list control panels

ListRoutingControls.description: Grants permission to list routing controls

ListSafetyRules.description: Grants permission to list safety rules

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a resource

PutResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to define the RAM access control policy for a cluster

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags from a resource

UpdateCluster.description: Grants permission to update a cluster

UpdateControlPanel.description: Grants permission to update a cluster

UpdateRoutingControl.description: Grants permission to update a routing control

UpdateSafetyRule.description: Grants permission to update a safety rule

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a tag's key and value in a request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the presence of tag keys in the request
